intro.description: Warm evening greeting, 2-3 sentences (Ukrainian). Include current day of week and a 1-sentence summary naming 2-3 key themes from today's news. Plain text (no HTML).

emoji.description: One relevant emoji for the topic

title.description: Short bold-worthy headline (5-10 Ukrainian words, rewritten shorter than original)

hook.description: One-line teaser/question under the title (Ukrainian, 3-8 words). Intrigues to click.

slug.description: Article slug for link (must match a provided slug exactly)

items.description: Exactly 10 news articles of the day, ordered by importance

pt.description: Portuguese word that appears in today's news articles

ua.description: Ukrainian translation (single word or short phrase)

glossary.description: Exactly 2 Portuguese words extracted from today's news, with Ukrainian translations

image_prompt.description: English prompt for gpt-image-1. Describe a single photorealistic Lisbon or Porto cityscape scene with people, where elements from all 10 news stories are visually woven into the environment (billboards, newspapers people read, background activities, shop windows, street scenes). One coherent image — not a collage. 2-4 dominant stories visible, others as subtle background hints.
